name: @gustavoadolfo/minhoteca-autor
description: API para consulta de autores do Minhoteca

scripts.pack:layers:core: cd ../../minhoteca-core-layer && npm run clean && npm run build && npm pack && cd ../../minhoteca-functions/autor-function
scripts.pack:layers:adapter: cd ../../minhoteca-adapter-layer && npm run build && npm pack && cd ../../minhoteca-functions/autor-function
scripts.build:localstack:admin: esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outdir=dist --external:@gustavoadolfo/minhoteca-core-layer --external:@gustavoadolfo/minhoteca-adapter-layer && cp package.localstack.json dist/package.json && cd ./dist && npm install
scripts.build:localstack: npm run pack:layers:core && npm run pack:layers:adapter && npm run clean && npm install && npm run build:localstack:admin
